title: Aspidium neglectum
taxonomy: Aspidium neglectum is classified within the genus Aspidium, which is now considered to be an outdated name and has been replaced by the genus Thelypteris. The Thelypteris genus belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This classification places Aspidium neglectum within the group of vascular plants, specifically ferns. The species is a part of the fern family and is typically found in tropical regions. Further classification may include the order and class of the plant, but these are not specified for Aspidium neglectum.
